text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, I stop by a shop with Agnes
Digital to pick up something she preordered.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting forever for this photo book... Oohoohoo, I'm duty-bound to open it as soon as I get home!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's because I bought three copies. One for
careful perusal, one for posterity, and one for
daily use!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Also, each copy comes with a special raffle entry
for an upcoming release event. Since I bought
three copies, I've tripled my chances of being
select—

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that Digital? No way! What a coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Oh! Hello! I haven't seen you since that
handout event!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're stopped by a woman inside of the shop. It
seems likely she's a fellow Umamusume fan.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a bit sudden, but you don't happen
to be free after this, are you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well, ummm...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning to go to a concert right after this,
but the friend I was supposed to go with can't
make it.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to leave an empty seat, so I thought I
should find someone else to go.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right after this? T-that would mean... wait, you're
talking about the secret concert tied to that one
album!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The "Phantom Secret" concert, right?! I bought
sooo many copies of the album, but none of them
contained any tickets!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I convinced myself there was no way to go to a
super-duper premium deluxe concert like that
and gave up... and yet, here you are, an actual
godsend, inviting me to go!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I've actually got two tickets, so you can
bring your friend, too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I would absolutely love to go! Gyaaaagh! Thank
you so so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, yay! I just know that you'll liven things
up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I'll put everything I've got into it! I even
have my light sticks on me already!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Does your friend have anything to bring? We're
allowed to take in our own support merch for the
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell them I don't have any light sticks or
anything, so they both graciously offer to lend me
something.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you want a light stick or a paper fan?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll let you borrow mine! Now, let's head to
the amusement park's special venue space!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh. My. Gooooosh! She winked at me! I must
have died and gone to heaven by this merciless
assault of fanservice!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what's this?! No way! Is this a new song?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the light sticks in the crowd change colors in
time with the music. I do my best to change the
color of mine too, but I panic and fail to make it
in time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Trainer! There's a setting to change
the color automatically. Push the button on the
right!
choice_data_list: But I've got the wrong color...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's no wrong way to enjoy a concert! Just
respect the rules and have good manners.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let the music carry you and pick whatever color
you like!
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll try just feeling it.
Okay, I'll try just feeling it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Remember to have fun!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh maaaaan... That was... the best. Seriously, like
the best of the very best...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you notice her grip during the first song?! I've
never wanted to be a mic stand so badly!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I liked how intense the dance for the new
song is! Their steps were so powerful, super fitting
for Umamusume. The choreographer really knows
what they're doing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's heel clicks were all timed so perfectly!
You could really feel how in sync they were!
choice_data_list: I liked when we waved the lights together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Definitely! Isn't waving the light stick fun?
choice_data_list:
It felt like the whole venue came together as
one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's exactly it! When the chorus and the
lights all synced up, it's like we were all unified!
That's the true beauty of concerts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's so great that I can talk about this with
you! The other times, I'm always alone, so I can
only fire off my feelings into the Umatterverse.
choice_data_list:
Moments like this after the concert are fun too,
yeah?

Moments like this after the concert are fun too,
yeah?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You totally get it! All right, then... I've got an
idea! I'm gonna apply for two tickets to the
release event tied to the photo books I bought
today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I win tickets, let's go together! And then we can
talk all about it after! Okay?!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
You can use the fan my friend was going to use!
Okay, shall we head to the venue over at the
amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
More! Love!
Straight to! My heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The call and response echoes throughout the
entire event space. The thrill of the crowd reaches
a fever pitch, and Agnes Digital goes wild along
with everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, the Umamusume on stage walks in our
direction as she sings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer, your fan! Your fan! Show her the fan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as I'm told and fix the way I'm holding the fan
so the words are facing the stage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohmigaaaaagfhksgh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I saw them! She really spun and showed them to us! Pant, pant. That. Was. Too. CUTE! The way she lifted her leg?! The way her skirt fluttered?! Absolutely... DIVINE!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaagh! A real angel came down from heaven!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Thanks for allowing me that sip, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause of the fan! The fan! Thanks to that, she
gave you a big glass of fanservice, and I got a sip
too!
choice_data_list: Oh yeah. That was pretty nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume on the stage saw our message
and reacted to it. Even if it was only for a split
second, it felt like we were communicating.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right? And it's not just the fanservice. Once you
get a taste of the concert atmosphere, it makes
you wanna do it again and again.
choice_data_list: Yeah, I think I know what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, live concerts have got you hooked now,
yeah? Congrats, welcome to the ocean of Horsegirl
simping! ☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got an idea! I'm gonna apply for two tickets
to the release event tied to the photo books I
bought today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's go to another concert together! We'll dive
deeper and deeper till we're drowning in Horsegirl
glory!
